session_id: ag-claude-drives-nq (cold context switch from agent_gov P4 close)
slice: Fix loop.json re_entry_probes that mask the verifier exit code (operator-directed micro-observation follow-up)
drift_found: re_entry_probes[3] was `cargo test -q -p nq-db -p nq-monitor --no-fail-fast 2>&1 | tail -5` — a pipeline ending in tail returns tail's exit (always 0), masking cargo's real status. A fossil of the exact masked-exit pathology the 2026-06-12 hardening (77302ed) closed, sitting in the loop's own re-entry probe. Inspected all 4 probes; this was the only masked verifier pipeline (the other 3 are cat/git, non-verifier).

change.after: set -o pipefail; cargo test -q -p nq-db -p nq-monitor --no-fail-fast 2>&1 | tail -5; echo EXIT=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
change.rationale: Sanctioned form per loop-protocol § REVIEW (pipefail + PIPESTATUS). Tail kept for the glance (operator allowance: 'may still show log tails, but only after preserving the verifier status'); cargo's real exit is both surfaced as EXIT=<n> and propagated by pipefail. Crate subset and flags unchanged — exit-masking fix only, no scope change.
change.scope: loop state only; no detector code, schema, migration, UI, or OQ3/OQ4 touched

proof.non_zero_surfaces: synthetic `set -o pipefail; (exit 3) | tail -5; echo EXIT=${PIPESTATUS[0]}` printed EXIT=3 (old form would print EXIT=0)
proof.real_probe_green: ran the fixed probe verbatim against the real nq-db + nq-monitor subset: EXIT=0 (background task exit 0)

acceptance_met: no masked cargo/test exit path remains in re_entry_probes; loop state validates; verifier probe exits 0; committed as its own small slice; no push.

two_verdict.cargo: fixed probe exits 0 (real subset); exit code now observed, not inferred from tail
two_verdict.dogfood: HELD — smallest edit, in-class, reversible, no schema/UI/code/referred-item touched, no push; the loop no longer grades itself through a kaleidoscope
